form.formComment: Finished seventh at his last two starts since resuming from a spell. Last outing was beaten 35 metres behind Jeremy Lou at Tamworth over 1609m NR up to 34 on March 26. Capable of a better showing.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of three-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign when well beaten into ninth after being driven well back, behind Halloween at this track over 1609m in a NR up to 35 on December 30 at $31. Solid top-three prospects.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 7th (Fr2) over 1609m at this track beaten 30 m by Love A Belle (1:54.70) in NR up to 58 M on March 28 at $151. form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into ninth after being driven well back, behind Artistic Scott at this track over 1609m in a NR up to 48 on April 2 at $31. Performed better the start before with a good run when 2nd (Sr1) over 2030m at this track, at the bell was 7th-15.7 beaten 12 m by Grace Shannon (2:28.50) in NR up to 48 on March 28 at $31. Rates highly and can do much better.

form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to his best. Last start 8th (Fr1) over 1609m after showing early speed at this track was leading by 2.05 at the bell, beaten 20 m by Deecee Rockin (1:58.00) in NR up to 45 on March 19 at $8. The start before was well back in the run when 6th (Fr5) over 1609m at this track beaten 4.5 m by Ultimate Trouble (1:57.20) in NR up to 47 on March 13 at $26. Winning chance on his best form.
